name: Lumpia Shanghai (Phillipine Fried Egg Rolls, Shanghai Sty
recipeInstructions:
1. In a blender, combine half of the tempeh with tamari, water, oil, honey, and cornstarch. Puree.
2. In another bowl, mix the other half of the tempeh with chopped onions, mushrooms, ginger root, and vegetables.
3. Add the puree to the vegetable mixture and hand mix thoroughly.
4. Place a rounded teaspoon of filling in the center of each wonton skin.
5. Moisten the outer rim of the wonton skin and fold it over to seal, pressing the edges together.
6. Steam the rolls for 8 minutes.
7. Serve with Sweet and Sour Sauce.
- - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - -
